description: Fix Incomplete Rebrand from Keywords AI to Respan - clean up all remaining old brand references missed in the initial rebrand commit

userStories.title: Rename keywordsai_api_controls field in create_log schema
userStories.description: As a developer using the MCP server, I want consistent field naming so that the API schema does not reference a defunct brand.
acceptanceCriteria: In lib/observe/logs.ts, rename the Zod field keywordsai_api_controls to respan_api_controls (around line 255)
The .describe() text on that field is also updated if it references the old name
userStories.notes: Renamed keywordsai_api_controls to respan_api_controls in lib/observe/logs.ts:255. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Fix old header and env var names in api/auth.ts
userStories.description: As a developer deploying the server, I want the auth proxy to read the correct respan-api-base-url header and RESPAN_API_BASE_URL env var, not the old Keywords AI equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: In api/auth.ts line 18, change KEYWORDS_API_BASE_URL to RESPAN_API_BASE_URL
userStories.notes: Changed 'keywords-api-base-url' to 'respan-api-base-url' and KEYWORDS_API_BASE_URL to RESPAN_API_BASE_URL in api/auth.ts. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Fix old repository URLs and directory name in README
userStories.description: As a new contributor, I want the README to point to the correct repository so I can clone and contribute without confusion.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md line 63: git clone URL updated from https://github.com/Keywords-AI/keywordsai-mcp.git to https://github.com/respanai/respan-mcp.git
README.md line 64: cd keywordsai-mcp updated to cd respan-mcp
README.md line 89: Vercel deploy button repository-url param updated from Keywords-AI/keywordsai-mcp to respanai/respan-mcp
userStories.notes: Updated git clone URL to respanai/respan-mcp.git, cd directory to respan-mcp, and Vercel deploy button URL in README.md. No remaining brand refs in source files. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Add OAUTH_SECRET to .env.example
userStories.description: As a developer setting up the project, I want .env.example to list all required environment variables so I do not miss any during setup.
acceptanceCriteria: .env.example includes an OAUTH_SECRET entry with a comment explaining it is required for OAuth flows (HTTP/Vercel deployment only)
userStories.notes: Added OAUTH_SECRET entry with comment to .env.example. Typecheck passes.
